meta_title: ciaobricks — Turn your photos into bricks
meta_desc: ciaobricks turns any photo into a LEGO®-style brick mosaic: brick-by-brick preview, building instructions and a parts list with BrickLink codes. 100% on-device.
og_title: ciaobricks — Turn your photos into bricks
og_desc: From photo to brick mosaic in seconds. Live preview, instructions and parts list. All on your iPhone.
pp_meta_desc: ciaobricks Privacy Policy: the app works entirely on your device. No photo uploads, no tracking.
hero_badge: Coming soon to the App Store
hero_lead: ciaobricks turns any photo into a LEGO®-style brick mosaic. Pick a photo, set the grid, and get a live preview, step-by-step building instructions and the complete parts list.
how_title: From photo to mosaic in 3 steps.
step1_d: Take one now or import from your library. Any image works.
step2_d: Set the grid from 16×16 to 64×64 studs and the number of colours. Apply filters and adjustments.
step3_d: Follow the step-by-step instructions and get the parts list with BrickLink IDs and a price estimate.
f1_d: From photo to brick artwork almost in real time.
f2_d: Palette mapped to real BrickLink codes: your shopping list is ready.
f3_d: B&W, Sepia, Cyanotype, Pop, Duotone and Game Boy to style your photo.
f4_d: Exposure, contrast, saturation and frames to refine every detail.
f5_d: Tweak every single brick by hand for a perfect result.
f6_d: Choose original LEGO® bricks or unbranded generic ones: the list adapts.
f7_d: Everything happens on device: no account, no tracking, no server.
f8_d: Available in Italian, English and French.
priv_title: All on your device. Zero tracking.
priv_desc: Your photos never leave your iPhone. No server, no account, no tracking. ciaobricks works fully offline: your creativity stays private.
q1: Do I need original LEGO® bricks?
a1: No. You can choose original LEGO® bricks or generic/unbranded ones: the parts list adapts automatically to your choice.
q2: Which devices does it work on?
a2: ciaobricks is a native app for iPhone and iPad running a recent version of iOS/iPadOS.
a3: Yes. All processing happens on your device: no server uploads, no account and no tracking.
q4: How do I buy the bricks?
a4: The app generates the full parts list with quantities, colours and BrickLink IDs, plus a price estimate: you have everything to order them.
q5: Which languages is it available in?
foot_tagline: Turn your photos into brick mosaics, right from your iPhone.
disclaimer: ciaobricks is an independent app and is not affiliated with, authorized, sponsored, or endorsed by the LEGO Group or BrickLink. LEGO® and BrickLink® are trademarks of the LEGO Group.
pp_intro: ciaobricks is designed to work entirely on your device. This page explains what information the app handles and how.
pp_photos_d: Photos you take or choose are processed entirely on your device to generate your mosaic. No image is ever uploaded or sent anywhere.
pp_profile_d: Any name, contact, or address details you enter in your Profile are stored only on your device and are never transmitted. They exist so this information is ready ahead of a future ordering feature; they are not sent to us or to anyone else today.
pp_diag_d: ciaobricks uses Apple's on-device MetricKit to collect anonymised performance and crash diagnostics. This data stays on your device unless you've opted into sharing analytics with developers in iOS Settings — a system-level choice, not something this app controls.
pp_track_d: ciaobricks does not track you across apps or websites, and does not use third-party analytics or advertising SDKs.
pp_contact_lead: Questions about this policy can be sent to:
